mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_ez_in_out_visit ( visit_id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, visit_time VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, visitor_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, visitor_phone VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, target_emp_id VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, target_dept_name VARCHAR(100), target_emp_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, target_title_name VARCHAR(100), target_mobile_no VARCHAR(30), target_direct_no VARCHAR(30), visit_reason VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, visit_reason_etc VARCHAR(255), agree_yn CHAR(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y', created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INDEX idx_ez_in_out_visit_created_at (created_at), INDEX idx_ez_in_out_visit_target_emp_id (target_emp_id) )
ALTER TABLE tb_ez_in_out_visit ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visit_reason VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '단순 방문', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visit_reason_etc VARCHAR(255) NULL
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_security_notify ( emp_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY, updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_id, COALESCE(e.dept_name, '') AS dept_name, COALESCE(e.emp_name, '') AS emp_name, COALESCE(e.title_name, '') AS title_name, COALESCE(e.mobile_no, '') AS mobile_no, COALESCE(e.security_yn, 'N') AS security_yn, COALESCE(e.security_yn, 'N') AS notify_yn FROM tb_company_employee e WHERE COALESCE(e.emp_name, '') != '' ORDER BY e.dept_name ASC, e.emp_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ez_in_out_security (sensor_name, sensor_addr, status) VALUES (#{sensor_name}, #{sensor_addr}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, sensor_name, sensor_addr, detected_at, status FROM tb_ez_in_out_security ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT #{limit, jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT emp_id, COALESCE(dept_name, '') AS dept_name, COALESCE(emp_name, '') AS emp_name, COALESCE(title_name, '') AS title_name, COALESCE(mobile_no, '') AS mobile_no, COALESCE(direct_no, '') AS direct_no FROM tb_company_employee WHERE COALESCE(emp_name, '') != '' ORDER BY dept_name ASC, emp_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ez_in_out_visit ( visit_time, visitor_name, visitor_phone, target_emp_id, target_dept_name, target_emp_name, target_title_name, target_mobile_no, target_direct_no, visit_reason, visit_reason_etc, agree_yn ) VALUES ( #{visitTime}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{targetEmpId}, #{targetDeptName}, #{targetEmpName}, #{targetTitleName}, #{targetMobileNo}, #{targetDirectNo}, #{visitReason}, #{visitReasonEtc}, #{agreeYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT visit_id, visit_time, visitor_name, visitor_phone, target_emp_id, target_dept_name, target_emp_name, target_title_name, target_mobile_no, target_direct_no, visit_reason, visit_reason_etc, agree_yn, created_at FROM tb_ez_in_out_visit WHERE visit_id = #{visitId}
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tb_ez_in_out_pin ( idx INT(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL, pin_1 INT(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL, pin_2 INT(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL ) ENGINE=InnoDB
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_company_employee WHERE pw_no = #{value} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT emp_id, COALESCE(dept_name, '') AS dept_name, COALESCE(emp_name, '') AS emp_name, COALESCE(title_name, '') AS title_name, COALESCE(mobile_no, '') AS mobile_no, COALESCE(direct_no, '') AS direct_no FROM tb_company_employee WHERE pw_no = #{value} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
